utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I can not believe I am going to lose this job !

emotion_cause.span: 1_I am going to lose this job !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh I am so sorry man ! Is there anything I can do ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_I am going to lose this job !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah ! Help me get this mini ... fridge past the security guard .

utterances.speaker: Wayne
utterances.text: Hey Joey , I want to talk to you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah ? I don’t want to talk to you Wayne ! I hate you ! You ruined my life !

emotion_cause.span: 5_I hate you ! You ruined my life !

utterances.speaker: Wayne
utterances.text: Joey , Joey , I ... I ... I will g ... get you your job back if you help me out .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Why should I help you out ? !

emotion_cause.span: 9_I ... I ... I will g ... get you your job back if you help me out .
9_I ... I ... I will g ... get you your job back if you help me out .

utterances.speaker: Wayne
utterances.text: I ... I ... I saw you on stage talking to that beautiful woman , you know Sarah ?
